deep_research_reuse.summary: The Durham Deep Research artifact was used as the city/source-policy map. It framed Durham as capture-first and proof-led, but the prior public-commercial list was too shallow. This run expands the public-facing lane before waiting on community replies while preserving that public access is not rights clearance.

payout_formula.non_guarantee: Suggested payout is a planning estimate only. Review-only candidates are not payable jobs until the downstream launch target and field assignment gates pass.

accepted_candidates.place_name: Durham Food Hall - interior hall and public seating
accepted_candidates.source_evidence_summary: Discover Durham describes Durham Food Hall as a modern food hall with a centralized bar, many vendors, private event space, and a large public area; tenant pages confirm active food-hall vendors inside.
source_queries: Durham NC food hall indoor public market official
Durham Food Hall Discover Durham large public area
accepted_candidates.public_access_posture: Public-facing food hall with common customer seating and vendor circulation during posted business hours.
allowed_capture_zones: central bar perimeter from public side
upper public overlook only if open during visit
avoid_zones: private event rooms unless separately authorized
close capture of diners or payment screens
accepted_candidates.camera_policy_evidence: No hostile public camera policy found in fetched public sources; privacy/signage review still required before assignment.
accepted_candidates.payout_basis: base 2500 + 55 minutes at 75/min + standard complexity 1200 + large-area component 2500. Estimate is reviewable and not guaranteed until assignment approval.
accepted_candidates.notes: Zone-specific replacement for the earlier generic Durham Food Hall shortlist item.

accepted_candidates.place_name: The Streets at Southpoint - indoor mall concourse and food court
accepted_candidates.source_evidence_summary: The official site lists over 150 shops, restaurants, a map/directory, and Durham address; Discover Durham confirms the mall is both outdoor and inside, so only the indoor mall concourse and food court zone is accepted.
source_queries: The Streets at Southpoint official directory indoor mall Durham NC
The Streets at Southpoint mall map official indoor common areas Durham
accepted_candidates.public_access_posture: Public mall common areas during mall hours; outdoor lifestyle wing is excluded from the accepted capture zone.
allowed_capture_zones: connector corridors between public retail anchors
avoid_zones: store interiors unless store-specific permission exists
accepted_candidates.camera_policy_evidence: Official public site includes code-of-conduct link but no fetched no-photo/no-video prohibition; mall security/operator review remains required before field assignment.
accepted_candidates.payout_basis: base 2500 + 90 minutes at 75/min + high-complexity component 4500 + large-area component 5000. Estimate is reviewable and not guaranteed until assignment approval.
accepted_candidates.notes: Earlier shortlist item survives only as an indoor-zone-scoped candidate, not as the full mixed mall property.

accepted_candidates.place_name: Durham Green Flea Market - indoor vendor hall
accepted_candidates.source_evidence_summary: The official market page describes free patron admission, weekend hours, indoor booth details, and indoor booth spaces; Discover Durham confirms the public weekend market address and hours.
source_queries: Durham Green Flea Market indoor booths official Durham NC
The Durham Green Flea Market Discover Durham
accepted_candidates.public_access_posture: Public market with free patron admission; accepted only for the indoor vendor hall and indoor booth aisles.
allowed_capture_zones: public food/vendor common areas where not crowded
accepted_candidates.camera_policy_evidence: No hostile public camera policy found in fetched sources; crowd/privacy review required.
accepted_candidates.payout_basis: base 2500 + 65 minutes at 75/min + complex component 2500 + large-area component 2500. Estimate is reviewable and not guaranteed until assignment approval.
accepted_candidates.notes: Mixed site accepted only because the indoor vendor hall is explicitly source-backed.

accepted_candidates.place_name: Durham Visitor Info Center - interior visitor space
accepted_candidates.source_evidence_summary: Discover Durham describes a spacious, equipped visitor center with natural light, tall ceilings, interactive displays, printed maps, destination experts, address, and public hours.
source_queries: Durham NC visitor center indoor official Discover Durham
Discover Durham Visitor Info Center spacious interactive displays
accepted_candidates.public_access_posture: Public visitor information center during posted hours.
allowed_capture_zones: interactive display perimeter when not capturing screen content
accepted_candidates.camera_policy_evidence: No hostile camera policy found in fetched public sources; staff courtesy check recommended before assignment.
accepted_candidates.payout_basis: base 2500 + 20 minutes at 75/min + simple component 500. Estimate is reviewable and not guaranteed until assignment approval.
accepted_candidates.notes: Small but clean indoor public-space candidate useful for app feed breadth.

accepted_candidates.place_name: 21c Museum Hotel Durham - public museum galleries
accepted_candidates.source_evidence_summary: 21c's official Durham site describes contemporary art integrated into the hotel and the museum page states curated exhibitions are open round the clock and free of charge.
source_queries: 21c Museum Hotel Durham galleries photography policy public official
21c Museum Hotel Durham museum free public galleries
accepted_candidates.public_access_posture: Public-facing hotel museum galleries open free of charge; capture zone is the gallery/common-area side, not guest-only hotel areas.
allowed_capture_zones: public restaurant/gallery threshold where not disrupting service
avoid_zones: artwork close capture if rights signage restricts it
accepted_candidates.camera_policy_evidence: No hostile no-photo policy found in fetched official sources; artwork-rights and hotel staff review still required.
accepted_candidates.payout_basis: base 2500 + 45 minutes at 75/min + standard component 1200 + large-area component 1000. Estimate is reviewable and not guaranteed until assignment approval.
accepted_candidates.notes: Strong indoor candidate; promotion still does not clear artwork rights or commercialization.

accepted_candidates.place_name: The Durham Hotel - lobby Coffee Bar
accepted_candidates.address: 315 E Chapel Hill St, Durham, NC 27701
accepted_candidates.source_evidence_summary: The Durham Hotel's official Coffee Bar page describes an all-day gathering place served in an airy two-story lobby with public-facing food/drink service and hours.
source_queries: The Durham Hotel lobby coffee bar official public Durham
accepted_candidates.public_access_posture: Public-facing hotel coffee bar and lobby gathering area during posted service hours.
avoid_zones: private events or reserved group areas
accepted_candidates.camera_policy_evidence: No hostile camera policy found in fetched official source; staff courtesy review recommended.
accepted_candidates.payout_basis: base 2500 + 25 minutes at 75/min + simple component 500. Estimate is reviewable and not guaranteed until assignment approval.
accepted_candidates.notes: Hotel-lobby candidate; keep guest-only areas out of scope.

accepted_candidates.place_name: Frontier RTP Building 800 - free public coworking floor
accepted_candidates.source_evidence_summary: Frontier RTP's official coworking page describes free public coworking on the first floor in Building 800, meeting rooms, amenities, and food options nearby; RTP context confirms free coworking as a public amenity.
source_queries: Research Triangle Park Frontier RTP public coworking lobby Durham official
Frontier RTP free public coworking Building 800
accepted_candidates.public_access_posture: Free public coworking floor with common work areas; meeting rooms and tenant spaces are separate.
accepted_candidates.camera_policy_evidence: No hostile camera policy found in fetched public sources; coworking privacy review required.
accepted_candidates.payout_basis: base 2500 + 60 minutes at 75/min + complex component 2500 + large-area component 2500. Estimate is reviewable and not guaranteed until assignment approval.
accepted_candidates.notes: Nearby RTP candidate is launch-relevant for Durham if the active radius includes RTP.

accepted_candidates.source_evidence_summary: Durham Arts Council lists building hours and says its galleries are free and open to the public daily; Durham Art Guild identifies the Truist Art Gallery on the first floor.
source_queries: Durham Arts Council building gallery public hours Durham official
Durham Art Guild Truist Gallery public hours Durham
accepted_candidates.public_access_posture: Free public galleries inside the Durham Arts Council building during public building hours.
avoid_zones: artwork close capture if signage restricts it
accepted_candidates.camera_policy_evidence: No hostile public camera policy found in fetched sources; artwork/signage check required before capture.
accepted_candidates.payout_basis: base 2500 + 35 minutes at 75/min + standard component 1200. Estimate is reviewable and not guaranteed until assignment approval.
accepted_candidates.notes: Public gallery candidate; downstream rights review must handle artwork capture boundaries.

accepted_candidates.place_name: Foster's Market - indoor cafe and market
accepted_candidates.source_evidence_summary: Foster's official site states it is open for indoor and outdoor dining, takeout, and market/cafe service; Discover Durham notes indoor seating and the retail/gift selection.
source_queries: Foster's Market Durham indoor dining official
Foster's Market Discover Durham indoor seating
accepted_candidates.public_access_posture: Public cafe/market with indoor dining and customer retail areas; porch/lawn are excluded.
allowed_capture_zones: public ordering approach where not capturing payment details
accepted_candidates.camera_policy_evidence: No hostile public camera policy found in fetched sources; operator courtesy review recommended.
accepted_candidates.payout_basis: base 2500 + 25 minutes at 75/min + simple component 500. Estimate is reviewable and not guaranteed until assignment approval.
accepted_candidates.notes: Accepted only as indoor cafe/market interior, not the outdoor seating/lawn.

accepted_candidates.place_name: Nasher Museum of Art - Great Hall and public galleries
accepted_candidates.source_evidence_summary: Nasher's visitor page states free admission, public hours, Great Hall/cafe guidance, and gallery access. A rental guideline references photography/film in the Great Hall and other event spaces, but capture policy for Blueprint-style walkthrough still needs review.
source_queries: Nasher Museum Duke visit photography policy lobby galleries Durham
Nasher Museum Great Hall photography film policy
accepted_candidates.public_access_posture: Public museum with free admission; only visitor-access Great Hall, cafe approach, and public galleries are in scope.
allowed_capture_zones: public gallery circulation if signage permits
accepted_candidates.camera_policy_evidence: Public visitor page does not provide a complete camera policy for walkthrough capture; rental guideline mentions photography/film in the Great Hall. Keep review-only until museum policy is confirmed.
accepted_candidates.payout_basis: base 2500 + 50 minutes at 75/min + complex component 2500 + large-area component 2500. Review-only estimate; not payable until policy/operator review passes.
accepted_candidates.notes: Accepted into review-only supply, not auto-promotable until camera/artwork policy is explicit.

accepted_candidates.place_name: Museum of Life and Science - indoor exhibit zones
accepted_candidates.source_evidence_summary: The museum's exhibit page labels multiple exhibits as indoor, including Aerospace and Butterfly House; Discover Durham describes more than 25 indoor and outdoor exhibits on the museum campus.
source_queries: Museum of Life and Science Durham indoor exhibits official plan visit
Museum of Life and Science Durham indoor exhibits visitor photography policy official
accepted_candidates.public_access_posture: Ticketed public museum with source-backed indoor exhibit areas; outdoor exhibits and animal/privacy-sensitive areas are out of scope.
allowed_capture_zones: museum lobby/common areas when not crowded
accepted_candidates.camera_policy_evidence: Indoor exhibit evidence is strong, but public camera/video policy was not found in fetched sources. Keep review-only until policy and privacy controls are confirmed.
accepted_candidates.payout_basis: base 2500 + 70 minutes at 75/min + high-complexity component 4500 + large-area component 2500. Review-only estimate; not payable until policy/operator review passes.
accepted_candidates.notes: Good indoor supply candidate but needs child/privacy policy review before promotion.

accepted_candidates.place_name: Rubenstein Arts Center - public gallery and Ruby Lounge
accepted_candidates.source_evidence_summary: Duke Arts describes the Rubenstein Arts Center as open to the public daily and lists gallery/program spaces inside a 70,000+ square foot arts building.
source_queries: Rubenstein Arts Center Duke Durham gallery hours public photography policy
Duke Arts Rubenstein Arts Center visitor information public gallery spaces Durham
accepted_candidates.public_access_posture: Public arts center during posted public hours; capture scope is gallery/lounge/common paths only.
allowed_capture_zones: Rubenstein Arts Center Gallery public circulation
accepted_candidates.camera_policy_evidence: Public access evidence is strong, but no complete camera policy was found in fetched sources. Keep review-only until Duke venue policy is confirmed.
accepted_candidates.payout_basis: base 2500 + 45 minutes at 75/min + standard component 1200 + large-area component 1000. Review-only estimate; not payable until policy/operator review passes.
accepted_candidates.notes: University building accepted only as public gallery/lounge review candidate, not classrooms or student production spaces.

accepted_candidates.place_name: Durham Convention Center - pre-function hallway and lobby
accepted_candidates.source_evidence_summary: Official Durham Convention Center pages state more than 35,000 square feet of meeting space, a physical connection to the Marriott, and exhibitor guidance requiring clearance in the pre-function hallway.
source_queries: Durham Convention Center meeting spaces lobby pre function corridor
Durham Convention Center floor plan pre-function hallway
accepted_candidates.public_access_posture: Event-dependent public/attendee concourse; not an always-open public space.
allowed_capture_zones: pre-function hallway when event access permits
accepted_candidates.camera_policy_evidence: Public/event access is event-dependent; official exhibitor packet is operational evidence, not capture permission. Keep review-only until event/operator authorization is explicit.
accepted_candidates.payout_basis: base 2500 + 70 minutes at 75/min + high-complexity component 4500 + large-area component 2500. Review-only estimate; not payable until event/operator review passes.
accepted_candidates.notes: Strong indoor concourse candidate but event-dependent, so not auto-promotable.

accepted_candidates.place_name: Durham Marriott City Center - lobby and Starbucks area
accepted_candidates.source_evidence_summary: Marriott describes the hotel as connected to the Durham Convention Center and notes Starbucks in the lobby; the Convention Center FAQ confirms the physical connection while separate management remains.
source_queries: Durham Marriott City Center lobby Starbucks connected convention center official
Durham Convention Center Marriott physically connected FAQ
accepted_candidates.public_access_posture: Public-facing hotel lobby/Starbucks area connected to convention activity; guest-only and controlled areas excluded.
allowed_capture_zones: convention-center connector approach if publicly accessible
accepted_candidates.camera_policy_evidence: No hostile camera policy found in fetched sources; hotel/operator courtesy review required.
accepted_candidates.payout_basis: base 2500 + 35 minutes at 75/min + standard component 1200. Review-only estimate; not payable until hotel/operator review passes.
accepted_candidates.notes: Useful as a zone-specific hotel/convention lobby review candidate.

Aloft Durham Downtown Re:Mix Lounge W XYZ official

allowed_capture_zones: W XYZ lobby bar customer area
accepted_candidates.camera_policy_evidence: No hostile camera policy found in fetched sources; hotel staff review required before assignment.
accepted_candidates.payout_basis: base 2500 + 25 minutes at 75/min + simple component 500. Review-only estimate; not payable until hotel/operator review passes.
accepted_candidates.notes: Small indoor public hotel lounge candidate; keep as review-only.

rejected_candidates.place_name: Durham Farmers Market / Durham Central Park Pavilion
source_queries: Durham Farmers Market pavilion outdoor market official
rejected_candidates.rejection_reason: Market/pavilion use is primarily outdoor or open-air. No separable indoor public capture zone was source-backed for this lane.

source_queries: Boxyard RTP official Durham outdoor shipping containers
rejected_candidates.rejection_reason: Source evidence frames Boxyard as repurposed shipping containers around an outdoor entertainment/market setting. Individual tenant interiors may be separate future candidates, but the campus-wide record is not indoor-primary.

source_queries: American Tobacco Campus Durham restaurants public interior campus official
rejected_candidates.rejection_reason: Campus-wide record is a mixed outdoor/office/restaurant district. It can only survive as a specific indoor tenant/lobby/retail corridor candidate with source-backed public access.

source_queries: Brightleaf Square Durham indoor common areas official
rejected_candidates.rejection_reason: Familiar Durham site, but fetched public evidence did not establish a zone-specific indoor public/common-access capture area separate from shops/restaurants and outdoor district circulation.

source_queries: Golden Belt Campus Durham indoor gallery public official
rejected_candidates.rejection_reason: Campus-wide candidate is mixed and not indoor-zone-specific. A specific gallery or tenant interior can be researched as a separate candidate if source-backed.

source_queries: CCB Plaza Durham official public plaza
rejected_candidates.rejection_reason: Outdoor plaza/streetscape; no indoor allowed capture zone.

source_queries: Northgate Mall Durham indoor mall current status
rejected_candidates.rejection_reason: Historic indoor mall evidence is stale and current public indoor mall operations were not verified. Do not seed as live supply.

source_queries: Durham Performing Arts Center rules camera recording equipment policy lobby
rejected_candidates.rejection_reason: Venue rules prohibit video/audio recording devices. Do not promote through autonomous public-space lane.

source_queries: Durham County Main Library photography policy public lobby
rejected_candidates.rejection_reason: Indoor public building, but the library filming/photography policy requires written permission for commercial/professional filming and restricts capturing the public/staff in backgrounds. Keep out of auto-promotion.
